CAPTAIN HOLLISTER: Captain Hollister is a 70-year-old gruff old man, with years of experiences behind him. He has facial hair; a beard, chest hair, arm hair and leg hair. His hair is black, with the tips of it being greyish. His dark blue eyes appear harsh, but he's not mean at all. His height is 6'7". Despite being in his 70's, he's strong, and very much capable.

OFFICER KEEN: Officer Keen is a 47-year-old Second Officer of the Aurora. He has a striking appearance. He has hazel eyes, filled with constant tiredness. He's a weary man with a knack for perfection. His hair is the color of the darkest brown. He has a small moustache. His height is 6'2". He has light chest hair, leg hair and arm hair.

CTO YU: CTO Yu is a confident 27-year-old woman. She is the Chief Technology/Technical Officer. with caramel skin color, and brown long hair. Her eyes are dark brown, with flecks of gold.

BERKELEY: Our 26-year old engineer is a no-nonsense man. He is often serious, not much of a man full of jokes. He isn't grumpy either though... Well ok, maybe a little. Berkeley has dirty blonde hair and blue eyes that stare into your soul (not literally).

OZZY: We can't forget our 45-year-old Cafe Owner, Ozzy. Ozzy just oozes old man vibes. He is completely bald. His eyes are the color of mossy green.

RYLEY ROBINSON: Ah yes, our maintenance officer, Ryley Robinson.
creator: unseen_anomaly
